summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Trading Journal with Admin Dashboard and Forgot Password features. All backend APIs working correctly (26/26 tests passed). Frontend UI successfully tested with admin login, forgot password flow, and regular user functionality.
passed_tests: Backend API: All 26 tests passed (100% success rate)
User login page has 'Forgot password?' link - ✅
Forgot password page loads and works - ✅
Reset password flow validates tokens correctly - ✅
Admin can view all users list with P&L data - ✅
Admin can view user details with trading stats - ✅
Regular user journal page is accessible - ✅
Regular user analytics page is accessible - ✅
